title: Senior Software Engineer - Siemens India - Experienced Professionals

jsonLd.title: Senior Software Engineer - Siemens India - Experienced Professionals
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at Siemens India. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Senior Software Engineer to strengthen our Mysuru-based team.

About Siemens India:
Siemens India is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Write and execute unit tests and integration tests
• Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code
• Ensure code security and follow best practices for data protection
• Implement new features based on product requirements
• Contribute to system architecture and technical design decisions
• Work with agile methodologies including daily stand-ups and sprint planning
• Participate in code reviews and contribute to technical discussions

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in SQL
• Proficiency in Node.js
• Proficiency in Agile/Scrum
• Proficiency in MongoDB
• Proficiency in TensorFlow
• Proficiency in Microservices
• Proficiency in Go
• Proficiency in Rust

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Flexible working hours
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Referral bonus program
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Mysuru, Karnataka, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Siemens India!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
